title: Bitter Crisp Festive Garlic Stir-fry
description: A festive Slovakian-inspired dish featuring bitter greens and a bold garlic kick in a whole30-friendly preparation.
instructions: Wash and chop the bitter greens into bite-sized pieces.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic and red chilli powder; sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Add chopped bitter greens to the skillet. Stir-fry them evenly in the sauce for about 5 minutes or until they are wilted.
Season with salt and pepper, then toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast at 400°F (205°C) for about 10-15 minutes, tossing occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish or a main course based on your preference.
